channel.title: react on Simon Aronsson
channel.description: Recent content in react on Simon Aronsson

item.title: An introduction to Redux and Sagas #1
item.description:
Before we dive into redux and sagas, it might be nice to get some background.

What is Redux?

To quote the readme available over at https://redux.js.org/:

Redux is a predictable state container for JavaScript apps. It helps you write applications that behave consistently, run in different environments (client, server, and native), and are easy to test.
